title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between three and six words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

questions.firstSentence: You should not leave your bag unattended under any circumstances.
questions.secondSentence: Under (1) _________ your bag be left unattended.

questions.firstSentence: I find it difficult to believe that he won the race.
questions.secondSentence: I (1) _________ that he won the race.

questions.firstSentence: The project failed because of a lack of funding.
questions.secondSentence: A lack of funding (1) _________ the project.

questions.firstSentence: He had only just arrived when the phone rang.
I was about to call you when you walked in.
questions.secondSentence: I was (1) _________ you when you walked in.

questions.firstSentence: They are going to build a new shopping center in the city.
questions.secondSentence: A new shopping center is (1) _________ in the city.
